_provenance: DELTAS Africa Phase I consortia, curated from public record (AAS DELTAS Africa programme + each consortium's published lead institution and director). The AAS portal API (portal.aasciences.app/api/programmes) exposes the programme record but not its consortia, so this structural tier is hand-curated; programme metadata is reconciled to the live API record (id 3, abbreviation DELTAS).
